name: Bly Kids' Desk White - Pillowfort™
description:
Create a cozy place to read, study, draw and more with the Bly Desk from Pillowfort™. This simple and stylish writing desk is a perfect pick for children's rooms, made with a minimalist design in a versatile white and wood finish. Two open storage cubbies on the front create a perfect space for stashing books, pencils and other supplies, so they can keep the top of their desk free of clutter and ready to do homework or art projects. Plus, this white wooden writing desk can coordinate with a variety of shelves, storage bins and more to create a cohesive look while designing tidy organization solutions for their bedroom.

Overall Width: 40 inches
Overall Height: 30.5 inches
Overall Depth: 23 inches
Tabletop Width: 19 inches
Cubbie Height: 5 inches
Cubbie Width: 18.1 inches
